text:
Holga (ガルホ, Garuho) is a well-known model. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 12, Chapter 113 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

On her Two-Hour Listener Request Show, the host Cleo claims that everyone likens her to Holga, but she then tells her listeners to take it with a grain of salt since her hobby is lying. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

Holga is not mentioned in either of the anime adaptations. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 66 (1999) Hunter × Hunter - Episode 57 (2011) 

Translations around the World

References
